opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: I hid 3 years of pet hair damage for $47 — couch looks brand new
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained sofa covered in dog/cat hair, scratched arms, embarrassing to have guests over
opportunities.after_state: Smooth, clean, modern-looking couch with zero visible damage or pet hair — company-ready in 10 min
opportunities.why_now: Spring shedding season peaks in May — pet owners are desperate for fast, cheap couch fixes before summer guests arrive.

opportunities.specific_product: Stackable clear pantry bins with labels set
opportunities.transformation_hook: This $38 pantry kit made my kitchen look twice the size — before vs after
opportunities.before_state: Chaotic pantry with falling cans, expired food hidden in back, mismatched containers, no system
opportunities.after_state: Color-coded, labeled, stackable bins — everything visible and accessible, magazine-worthy pantry
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning season is at its May peak and pantry transformation Reels are the highest-shared format in home organization right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece outdoor sectional set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Turned my empty concrete patio into an outdoor living room for $299
opportunities.before_state: Bare, sad patio with a single lawn chair, no ambiance, unusable dead space going to waste
opportunities.after_state: Full cushioned sectional seating area with throw pillows — looks like a $1,500 outdoor room
opportunities.why_now: Mid-May is peak patio-buying season — buyers are actively furnishing for Memorial Day weekend gatherings.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow with adjustable fill
opportunities.transformation_hook: Woke up pain-free for the first time in a year — this $79 pillow changed everything
opportunities.before_state: Flat, yellowed old pillow causing neck pain, waking up stiff every morning, terrible sleep quality
opportunities.after_state: Customizable loft pillow perfectly contoured to neck, deep sleep, zero morning stiffness
opportunities.why_now: Sleep wellness content is surging on Reels and the pain-solution angle drives exceptional click-through with 20% commission upside.

opportunities.specific_product: 2-tier under-sink pull-out organizer with adjustable shelf
opportunities.transformation_hook: My bathroom went from disaster zone to spa vibes for $29 — before vs after
opportunities.before_state: Under-sink cabinet crammed with loose bottles, cleaning supplies falling out, no organization whatsoever
opportunities.after_state: Two-tier pull-out system with every product visible and accessible — spotless, spa-like bathroom cabinet
